routes.name: sdd_to_nadia_qa_review
routes.hard_rule: No SDD goes to tdd_block without Nadia QA signoff.
routes.rationale: V8.6 mid-pipeline QA. Catches PRD-to-SDD drift at design time, before Marcus locks task-level TDD red tests.

routes.name: nadia_sdd_signoff_to_tdd_block
routes.trigger: Nadia approves SDD against PRD intent
routes.hard_rule: Nadia signoff is required and recorded in sdd_qa_signoff.schema.json.

routes.name: nadia_sdd_return_to_marcus
routes.trigger: Nadia rejects SDD with cited PRD clauses
routes.hard_rule: Returns must include specific PRD clause references; vague rejection is not allowed.
